name: EthGetTokenData
title: EthGetTokenData
syntax: long EthGetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, char buffer[] );
description: The function requests the data or a part of date of a token.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of a packet that has been created with EthInitPacket

return:
number of copied bytes or 0
With EthGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
